subject: fix: add oklchToHex decimal tests, fix BottomSheet focus-stealing
body:
Two remaining items from full branch audit:

1. oklchToHex: Added 4 tests covering the decimal-without-percent path
   that was untested after the L normalization fix. Tests verify:
   - decimal 0.5 equals 50% (same mid-gray)
   - decimal 1 (no %) is white (L=1.0, not 1%)
   - percentage 1% is near-black (L=0.01)
   - decimal 0 is black
   Test count: 72 → 76.

2. BottomSheet: Focus-steal useEffect fired on every open, including when
   sheet was already open and user just switched tabs via MobileNav. This
   yanked focus from the just-tapped nav button after 350ms. Now tracks
   previous isOpen via wasOpenRef — only auto-focuses on closed→open
   transition. Sheet starts open (useState true) so initial mount also
   correctly skips the focus steal.

Tags: test, a11y, mobile, bugfix
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: branch-audit
Semver: patch
